items.summary: In frontend/src/components/Pricing.tsx, remove all price values from every service item — this includes all currency symbols (e.g. '$', '₹'), numeric amounts (e.g. $85, $110, $145), and any 'From $...' or 'Starting at $...' text. Keep only service category headers and service names. The section layout and styling must remain fully intact.

Audit all other frontend components (Services.tsx, BookingContact.tsx, Hero.tsx, Footer.tsx, Navigation.tsx, MapSection.tsx, FloatingActionButtons.tsx, and any other component) for any remaining price amounts, dollar signs, or 'From $...' text and remove them. Only service names and descriptions should remain.
